title: Remove and refit driveline components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Remove and refit driveline components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to test and remove driveline components

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Driveline removal, refit and adjustment procedures and information are sourced and interpreted1.3 Driveline testing procedures are sourced and interpreted from manufacturer specifications 1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Driveline removal, refit and adjustment procedures and information are sourced and interpreted1.3 Driveline testing procedures are sourced and interpreted from manufacturer specifications 1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to test and remove driveline components

elements.title: Test and remove driveline components

pcs.text: Driveline is tested according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Driveline components are removed according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Driveline components are inspected for faults according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements2.4 Results of driveline tests are reported according to workplace procedures

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Test and remove driveline components

elements.title: Refit and adjust driveline components

pcs.text: Driveline components are examined for serviceability prior to commencing the refitting procedures3.2 Driveline serviceable components are refitted according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements3.3 Driveline is lubricated and adjusted according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements3.4 Driveline is checked for correct assembly and operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Driveline components are examined for serviceability prior to commencing the refitting procedures3.2 Driveline serviceable components are refitted according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements3.3 Driveline is lubricated and adjusted according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements3.4 Driveline is checked for correct assembly and operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Driveline components are examined for serviceability prior to commencing the refitting procedures3.2 Driveline serviceable components are refitted according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements3.3 Driveline is lubricated and adjusted according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements3.4 Driveline is checked for correct assembly and operation according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Refit and adjust driveline components

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
